subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness which have descended from the realm of eternity, from that Spot wherein God calleth out with a wondrous new voice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس قد نزلت من شطر البقا بقعه التی فیها ینادی الله باحسن صوت بدیع و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
